_doc: Auto-protect governor policy. Holds each node in a healthy envelope by live-retuning miner intensity (Off/Gentle/Balanced/Turbo) via the dashboard control channel. PURELY PROTECTIVE by default: drops a node to 'off' when it's stressed or busy with its own work, restores to 'gentle' when it frees up. Raise a node's 'max' to make it a real miner. Back off fast (holdDown=1), ramp up slow (holdUp).

Air._note: fanless daily-driver — never beyond gentle; drop to off if I'm loading the machine

Ausra._note: her OWN heavy rig — mine only the gaps; back off the instant her programs spike
